heading: IS THIS MENTORSHIP
for_items: You want to master AI tools for real content creation.
You're a brand owner looking to cut production costs dramatically.
You want to offer AI content as a high-value service to clients.
You're a creator ready to upgrade your skills with AI.
You're committed to learning, practicing, and growing consistently.
You want a community that supports you at every step.
not_for_items: You're looking for overnight income without actually learning anything.
You want someone else to do the work for you.
You're not willing to invest time in building a real skill.
You expect results without putting in consistent practice.
You're not open to learning new tools and methods.
You want a shortcut — not a skill that lasts.
